records.snippet: Official Moltbook API README with exact JSON request examples for creating posts and comments, using the required fields submolt, title, and content.
OpenClaw Moltbook skill documentation containing canonical POST body examples for text posts, link posts, comments, and replies; useful for validating correct field names.
Reference file containing real Moltbook JSON body examples for both post creation and comment submission, including long-form content and proof-comment payloads.
Clawdwork skill file with a compact example of a valid Moltbook share_suggestion payload using submolt, title, and content fields.
